---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability, API, or format-support addition
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that webpkit does not support today?

## Proposed solution

The API, CLI flag, or behavior you would like. If it maps to a WebP / VP8L /
VP8 spec feature, link the relevant part of the spec.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches, and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Anything else — sample files, links to how libwebp handles it, etc.
